_rules.stop_loss: MANDATORY on every position. No stop = trade never entered.
_rules.position_sizing: Kelly-based: risk $500 per trade, position size = risk_amount / (entry - stop_loss)
_rules.feedback_loop: MANDATORY after every trade close — win or loss

position_schema.market: US Equity / Crypto / Forex / Commodity / Futures / International
position_schema.strategy: Swing / Momentum / Options / Index Futures / Macro / Mean Reversion / Carry
position_schema.feedback_logged: boolean — must be true before position removed
position_schema.signal_price: number — price at time of Alpha signal
position_schema.actual_entry: number — actual fill price (may differ from signal_price)
position_schema.execution_window: string — time window used for entry
